title: API: missing rate limiting on login endpoint
rationale: Title: stripped all three prefixes ('Re:', 'Fwd:', '[SECURITY]') from the subject, then also stripped 'Airflow' since the component name already implies the project. Affected versions: reporter explicitly states they did not note the version; '_No response_' is correct — do not infer a version from 'latest Docker Hub image'. Reporter credited as: display name 'T. Nguyen' from the From: header.
